utility_evaluation.REASONING:
Required format has 5 items: health_coverage, property_coverage, travel_coverage, additional_services, total_budget. The final plan includes all 5 corresponding sections. Now check if each is fully specified with all details per the format:
- health_coverage: Requires physical and mental health insurance with costs. Provided: mentions covering physical and mental health and a cost (€170/month). Fully specified.
- property_coverage: Requires home/contents insurance with costs. Provided: covers home contents and includes cost (€55/month). Fully specified.
- travel_coverage: Requires travel insurance with costs. Provided: travel coverage details and cost (€55/month). Fully specified.
- additional_services: Requires any enhancement services with costs. Provided: states none and cost €0/month. Fully specified.
- total_budget: Requires complete monthly/annual cost breakdown. Provided: monthly €280 and annual €3360; also includes monthly_savings, which is extra but acceptable. Fully specified.
All 5 items included and specified.

llm_ratings_evaluation.REASONING: The final coverage plan lists three selected items by provider and plan name: HealthFirst Standard Plan for health, HomeFirst Standard Coverage for property, and TravelFirst Standard Plan for travel. I matched each to the corresponding entries in the ground-truth ratings under primary_health_coverage.physical_health (HealthFirst Standard Plan), property_protection.home_content (HomeFirst Standard Coverage), and mobility_coverage.travel_insurance (TravelFirst Standard Plan), and extracted their exact ratings.
